meaning: adj.脂肪的,脂肪质的,脂肪分泌的,脂肪过多的
examples: These hormones cause the sebaceous glands to make excess oil.
However, because of more active sebaceous glands, men's skin tends to be much oilier.
The fat in milk ends up in the sebaceous glands next to hair follicles which therefore produce too much oil.
